## **2.2.2.I. PI #9**

### **What initiatives were implemented or are planned that will improve this PI and how does the NSA intend on monitoring their effectiveness on performance?**

The data regarding ratio has been received from NM upon request and published on the SES Performance Portal.

The data regarding total number of hours allocated & notofied to NM and total number of hours used have not been delivered by NM nor are available on the SES Performance Portal and cannot be monitored at local level.
